mapper.sql: id, event_id, defense_type, defense_action, defense_target, attack_id, traffic_id, rule_id, defense_reason, expire_time, execute_status, is_first, execute_result, operator, execute_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_defense_log WHERE defense_type = 'BLOCK_IP' AND defense_action = 'ADD' AND execute_status = 1 AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > NOW()) ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_defense_log WHERE defense_type = 'BLOCK_IP' AND defense_action = 'ADD' AND execute_status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_defense_log WHERE defense_type = 'BLOCK_IP' AND defense_action = 'ADD' AND defense_target = #{ip} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_defense_log WHERE defense_type = 'BLOCK_IP' AND defense_action = 'ADD' AND defense_target = #{ip}
mapper.select: SELECT STR_TO_DATE(time_str, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS time, count FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(execute_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS time_str, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_defense_log WHERE execute_time >= #{startTime} AND execute_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(execute_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') ) t ORDER BY time
